grant_title: Atlanta's Neighborhood-First Approach to Urban Development
geographic_restrictions: Atlanta, Georgia (targeted neighborhoods: six distressed areas)
project_area: Urban development, neighborhood revitalization, housing, education, commercial corridors, public spaces, and infrastructure
demographic_requirements: Focus on historically distressed neighborhoods with sustained poverty and underinvestment (40 of 101 neighborhoods in Atlanta)
eligibility_summary: Open to entities proposing place-based initiatives that align with Atlanta's four core pillars: strong schools, mixed-income housing, revitalized commercial corridors, and improved public spaces/infrastructure. Projects must target one of six designated distressed neighborhoods and demonstrate collaboration among government, nonprofits, philanthropy, and civic leaders.
